name: Lower State Road Golf Range
address: 500 Lower State Rd, North Wales, PA 19454
about: Lower State Road Golf Range is a modern golf facility that combines a traditional driving range with advanced simulator technology and league play options. The venue offers a loyalty program where customers earn points for simulator time, which can be redeemed for discounts on future bookings or free hours. It features a variety of services including lessons, events, and gift cards. The facility appears to be designed for both casual players and serious golfers looking for a practice environment with technology-enhanced capabilities.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced simulator technology for realistic play and practice
Flexible booking system with online reservations
Loyalty rewards program offering discounts and free play time
Variety of services including lessons and league play

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar service with various payment options

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you'll need to bring your own clubs to use the simulators and practice facilities.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed. The venue offers a full kitchen and bar service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes typically takes 1-2 hours depending on simulator availability and pace of play.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Lower State Road Golf Range is family-friendly and welcomes juniors and youth players.
